description_long: This is a dark brown, rectangular whiskey bottle with a broad, flat front and back, and narrow sides. The front features a large, weathered label reading 'Penny Remuer's Irish Whiskey' in ornate, vintage-style lettering, giving it an old-fashioned, rustic appearance. The bottle has a short neck topped with a black cap, which appears to be a screw cap. The surface of the bottle is matte and shows some subtle irregularities, suggesting it is made of glass with a slightly rough finish. The back of the bottle is plain, without any label or markings, and the overall shape is squat and sturdy. There are no visible signs of liquid inside, and the bottle appears empty.
description: A dark brown, rectangular whiskey bottle with a vintage 'Irish Whiskey' label and a black screw cap. The bottle has a matte, slightly rough glass surface and appears empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, ornate 'Penny Remuer's Irish Whiskey' label and the black cap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the bottle's narrow profile and the cylindrical neck with the cap.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, label-free surface and the bottle's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the neck with the cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large, ornate label on the front reading 'Penny Remuer's Irish Whiskey' in decorative, vintage-style text with intricate border designs. The label is beige with dark text and occupies most of the front face.
